name: Mamma’s Baked Vegetables
intro: My mother used to make these vegetables often in winter. By changing the vegetables, it becomes a new dish every time, so the vegetables used here are simply one suggestion.

ingredients.item: medium leeks, white, tender parts only, halved lengthways, rinsed well under running water
small cauliflower, broken into small florets
sea salt and ground black pepper

method: Butter a large ovenproof dish (about 30 × 40 cm). Lay the vegetables in rows next to each other. Pour over the cream and sprinkle with salt, pepper and parmigiano. Break the butter into little pieces and dot it over the vegetables.
Bake in the oven for about 25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender and golden on top.
